nasb.text: Yet you have not listened to Me,” declares the Lord, “in order that you might provoke Me to anger with the work of your hands to your own harm.

esv.text: Yet you have not listened to me, declares the Lord, that you might provoke me to anger with the work of your hands to your own harm.

cnv.text: 但你們沒有聽從我，竟容你們手所作的惹我發怒，自招禍害。”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“然而，你们不听我的话，制造神像惹我发怒，自招惩罚。”
